sourceOfTruth: Mission Control tasks.metadata + this mirrored local checklist

workflowSteps.title: Create and sync local + Mission Control checklist
requirements: Local checklist.md exists for this restaurant
Local checklist.json exists for this restaurant
Mission Control root + child task metadata mirrors checklist paths, requirements, evidence, and current stage
evidenceRequired: MC root task metadata with checklist paths

workflowSteps.title: Audit current site with browser evidence
requirements: Audit names concrete conversion, credibility, mobile, and factual gaps

workflowSteps.title: Capture Google Reviews evidence
requirements: Google Reviews opened in browser and sorted by Highest
30 written reviews captured, or exact shortage/blocker documented
Review themes summary is usable for copy and pitch docs

workflowSteps.title: Route to one archetype, fork template, and build first preview
requirements: Exactly one archetype/template route is chosen and justified
Template fork builds successfully with real content and preserved conversion links
No generic restaurant copy, fake claims, fake menu items, fake reviews, or fake ordering paths
evidenceRequired: preview URL or local preview evidence

workflowSteps.title: Run first full improvement pass
requirements: Copy/visual rhythm feels specific to the restaurant and selected archetype
Mobile pass is explicitly checked with evidence
evidenceRequired: before/after screenshots or changed file list
workflowSteps.notes: Local improved fork implemented and verified; stage remains in progress until MC/public preview/deploy evidence is finalized.

workflowSteps.title: Identify and implement top 3 improvements
requirements: Top 3 concrete improvements are named from audit/preview/QA
workflowSteps.notes: Top 3 ranked and locally implemented/evidenced; public preview update is pending before marking fully passed.

workflowSteps.title: Add truthful AI concierge or record blocker
requirements: Concierge KB only uses verified restaurant facts
Fallbacks prevent fake reservations, unsupported promises, or invented facts
evidenceRequired: blocker if concierge cannot be safely added

workflowSteps.title: Create sellable pitch doc
requirements: Pitch is specific to restaurant, neighborhood/cuisine, reviews, and conversion gaps
Pitch explains before/after delta in owner language
Evidence and preview links are embedded or linked

workflowSteps.title: Create owner battle cards
requirements: Likely owner objections have concise answers
Demo path and proof points are clear

workflowSteps.title: QA round 1
requirements: QA round 1 completed with screenshots, findings, fixes, and MC writeback

workflowSteps.title: QA round 2
requirements: QA round 2 completed with screenshots, findings, fixes, and MC writeback

workflowSteps.title: QA round 3 final sell-readiness QA
requirements: QA round 3 completed with final sell-readiness screenshots, fixes, and MC writeback
workflowSteps.blocker: qa_round_3 blocked: public preview https://graceful-ordinary-redesign.vercel.app is stale. Live check still shows unsupported AAA Three-Diamond content and does not show local v2 evidence-critical changes such as Ask Graceful concierge or Maytag Bleu Cheese. Deploy path check also found no local Vercel CLI/project binding, the site folder is untracked, and current branch is unrelated feat/la-hacienda-qa2, so the safe unblock is a clean branch/PR preview or explicitly approved non-production Vercel preview deployment, then rerun QA round 3.

workflowSteps.title: Package and deliver only after all gates pass
requirements: Preview URL, screenshots, pitch doc, battle cards, checklist, QA evidence, and requirement status are mirrored to MC
No delivery until MC has checklist paths, preview/artifact URL, and required gate evidence

evidencePaths.build_verification: npm run typecheck && npm run build; local routes / /menu /about /contact returned 200 on port 3025

blockers.reason: qa_round_3 blocked: public preview https://graceful-ordinary-redesign.vercel.app is stale. Deploy path check also found no local Vercel CLI/project binding, the site folder is untracked, and current branch is unrelated feat/la-hacienda-qa2, so the safe unblock is a clean branch/PR preview or explicitly approved non-production Vercel preview deployment, then rerun QA round 3.
